mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and discount rates for future earnings, directly increasing equity valuations and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5 percentage points over two months signals imminent labor market deterioration and reduced consumer spending, triggering negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive 20d returns occur in >55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising retail sales and falling housing starts indicates consumption substitution away from durable goods, creating sector rotation that suppresses broad market returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample regression.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth exceeding 2% annually during inflationary periods confirms supply-side resilience, allowing firms to pass through costs and sustain positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Returns turn negative when CPIAUCSL > 3% YoY despite strong INDPRO growth.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained monthly CPI growth above 4% triggers central bank hawkish expectations, compressing equity multiples and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns in >60% of triggered months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous payroll growth above 200k and unemployment rate decline below 3.5% signals an overheating labor market that forces monetary tightening, ultimately depressing equity returns.
failure_condition: Interaction effect reverses sign during recessionary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth above 2.5% confirms robust aggregate demand, supporting corporate earnings revisions and generating positive equity returns over a quarter.
Industrial production falling for three consecutive months confirms a supply-side contraction that reduces corporate output and earnings, driving negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns in >50% of triggered instances.
